zh.Of, Stargard, Mecklenburg, Prussia: 德國海因里希_包莫斯塔加德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pribislav of Mecklenburg於大約1120年出生時，他的父親Niklot of the Obotrites32歲，母親Adelheid10歲。他於1139年與Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter在丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1178年12月30日在德國尼德薩辛盧包格享年59歲，埋葬在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pribislav of Mecklenburg于大约1120年出生时，他的父亲Niklot of the Obotrites32岁，母亲Adelheid10岁。他于1139年与Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter在丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1178年12月30日在德国尼德薩辛盧包格享年59岁，埋葬在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

en.lifeSummary: When Pribislav of Mecklenburg was born about 1120, his father, Niklot of the Obotrites, was 32 and his mother, Adelheid, was 10. He married Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter in 1139, in Copenhagen, København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 30 December 1178, in Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bad Doberan, Rostock, East Germany.

fr.Bad Doberan, Rostocker, Mecklenburg-Vorp: Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pribislav of Mecklenburg est né environ 1120, son père, Niklot of the Obotrites, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Adelheid, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter en 1139, à Copenhague, København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 30 décembre 1178, à Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est.

de.Bad Doberan, Rostocker, Mecklenburg-Vorp: Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik
de.lifeSummary: Als Pribislav of Mecklenburg um 1120 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Niklot of the Obotrites 32 und seine Mutter Adelheid 10. Er hat 1139 in Kopenhagen, København, Dänemark Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 30. Dezember 1178 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik begraben.

it.Bad Doberan, Rostocker, Mecklenburg-Vorp: Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Germania Est
it.lifeSummary: Quando Pribislav of Mecklenburg è nato il circa 1120, il suo padre, Niklot of the Obotrites, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter nel 1139, nel København, København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 30 dicembre 1178, nel Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Germania Est.

ja.lifeSummary: Pribislav of Mecklenburgが約1120年に生まれた時，父Niklot of the Obotritesは32歳，母Adelheidは10歳であった。1139年にデンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴンでCathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1178年12月30日にドイツニーダーサチセンルuネブルグで59歳で死去し，東德ロストッククレイス バド ドバーアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pribislav of Mecklenburg(이)가 대략 1120년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niklot of the Obotrites(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1139년 덴마크 ko벤하브 코펜하겐에서 Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1178년 12월 30일 독일 니더작센 u니버그에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 동독 로스톡 크레이스 바드 도베란에 묻혔다.

pt.Bad Doberan, Rostocker, Mecklenburg-Vorp: Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pribislav of Mecklenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1120, seu pai, Niklot of the Obotrites, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter em 1139, em København, København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1178, em Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik.

ru.Bad Doberan, Rostocker, Mecklenburg-Vorp: крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pribislav of Mecklenburg родился около 1120 г., его отцу по имени Niklot of the Obotrites было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter в 1139 г. в местности Копенгаген, кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 30 декабря 1178 г. в местности лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pribislav of Mecklenburg nació aproximadamente 1120, su papá, Niklot of the Obotrites, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Adelheid, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Cathrine Princess of Norway Knudsdotter en 1139, en København, København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1178, en Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Alemania Oriental.
